case_title: JULIAN DEL VALLE VS. ADAM RICCARDI et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEL VALLE, JULIAN AS TO DEFENDANT RICCARDI, ADAM DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-15-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-16-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-31-2002
ARBITRATOR JACOB BURLAND APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION DEC-23-2002 THROUGH MAR-23-2003.
ARBITRATOR'S FEE STATEMENT, SENT TO ACCOUNTING FOR - JACOB BURLAND

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEL VALLE, JULIAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RICCARDI, ADAM $15,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $15,000.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT RICCARDI, ADAM
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR OF OCT-22-2002, OFF CALENDAR, PROOF OF SERVICE OR RESPONSE FILED
MOTION FOR CONTINUANCE FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEL VALLE, JULIAN
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-15-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON JUN-13-2003 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212. FOR JUDGMENT, DISMISSAL OR TRIAL DE NOVO. IF FILED, APPEARANCES WAIVED APR-15-2003 ARBITRATION OSC IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR DEC-09-2002. NOV-15-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CORRESPONDENCE, ARBITRATOR, JACOB BURLAND TO COUNSEL: ARBITRATION HEARING DATE: FEB-13-03 AT 10:00 AM.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT PERSONAL INJURY, PROPERTY DAMAGE AND OTHER DAMAGES, NOTICE TO PLTF., PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEL VALLE, JULIAN SERVED SEP-23-2002, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT RICCARDI, ADAM
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-13-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ENTERED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR OCT-22-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
